case_title: MICHAEL MUSLEH VS. KENYA BYES ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (NO SASE. ENDORSED COPY PLACED IN D501 OUTBOX)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5174 3RD STREET, #1, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL SERVED JUL-17-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL SERVED JUL-17-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, KENYA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE AND UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL LEASE [$89.29 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSLEH, MICHAEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
